jobs.name: nightly-dream-agent-memory
jobs.description: Nightly dream: agent LLM summarize lessons, embed QMD vault, extract facts to SQLite (3:03 AM Europe/London).

payload.text:
Run: node obsidian/summarize-to-lessons.js && qmd embed && node obsidian/l3-to-sqlite.js

Automated: summarize new lessons, embed vault, extract facts to SQLite.
